steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0032_no_anthropic_rq1_path_decision worktree and write branch_info.txt + step_tracker.json.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify both dependencies (t0027, t0031) are completed via verify_task_dependencies.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize the standard task folder skeleton (corrections, intervention, plan, research, assets/answer, results, logs subdirs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: no published-paper evidence is required to choose between (a)/(b)/(c)/(d) on this project's specific data.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Minimal scan of non-Anthropic API providers' published per-token pricing to support option (c) numbers; no other internet research needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Inventory existing t0027 paired N=130 outputs and t0031 power grid / discordance / RQ4 tables that the decision rests on.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan/plan.md describing the four-option comparison and the analysis-only execution shape.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: this task is analysis-only and provisions no remote machines.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Re-load the t0031 power grid + discordance numbers, evaluate the four options against cost/validity/comparability, produce the answer asset.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Search for at least one non-obvious cost-saver (discordance-only rerun, bootstrap re-resampling, etc.) and decide whether it changes the recommendation.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this is an internal decision task; no published benchmark exists to compare against.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results bundle (results_summary.md headline labels the chosen path; results_detailed.md embeds the comparison table; metrics/costs/remote_machines).

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Emit at most three follow-up suggestions tied to the chosen path.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Capture sessions, mark task completed, run all final verificators, push, PR, premerge, merge, refresh overview.
